# 2024.07.27武汉场（WIP）{#wuhan-20240727}

- [Part1](#wuhan-20240727-part1)

- [Part2](#wuhan-20240727-part2)

- [Part3](#wuhan-20240727-part3)

- [Part4](#wuhan-20240727-part4)

- [Part5](#wuhan-20240727-part5)

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='2024周深9.29Hz巡回演唱会2024.07.27武汉场歌单', out.width = "400px"}
knitr::include_graphics(rep("img/playlists/playlists-wuhan-20240727.png"))
```


## Part1 {#wuhan-20240727-part1}
[🎥【开场VCR】](#opening-vcr)

[🎵【借过一下】](#I-will-go-my-way)

[🎵【Monsters】](#Monsters)

[🎵【化身孤岛的鲸】](#hua-shen-gu-dao-de-jing)

[🎵【光亮】](#guangliang)

[🎵【若梦】](#ruomeng)

[🎵【浮光】](#fuguang)

## Part2 {#wuhan-20240727-part2}
[🎥【反深代词VCR】](#senself-vcr)

[🎵【蜃楼】](#mirage)

[🎵【警报】](#the-giver)

[🎵【嗨】](#say-hi)

[🎵【天堂岛之歌】](#haven-song)

[🎵【达啦崩吧】](#dalabengba)

[🎵【人是_】](#renshi)

## Part3 {#wuhan-20240727-part3}

[🎵【欢颜】](#happy-face)

[🎵【小美满】](#happy-ending)

[🎵【花开忘忧】](#no-worries) 

[🎵【My Only】](#my-only) [🎵【Rubia】](rubia.html)

🎵【邓丽君歌单组曲】

## Part4 {#wuhan-20240727-part4}
[🎥【谢谢武汉，谢谢你VCR】](#thank-you-vcr)

[🎵【听我说】](#listen-to-me) [🎵【望】](#hope)

[🎵【奇迹时刻】](#magic-moment)

[🎵【生日祝福歌】](#happy-birthday)

[🎵【璀璨冒险人】](#adventurers)

【点歌环节】

[🎵【三餐四季】](#three-meals-a-day)  

[🎵【不想睡】](#keep-playing)

[🎵【我以渺小爱你】](#love-you)


## Part5 {#wuhan-20240727-part5}
[🎵【起风了】](#the-wind-rises)

[🎵【大鱼】](#big-fish)

[🎵【少管我】](#watch-ur-manners)

***

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='周深武汉体育中心主体育场演唱会结束微博 【@weibo-charlie】'}
knitr::include_graphics(rep("img/weibo/wuhan-20240727.png"))
```
